description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This leather belt from puma is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: 110 cmMade of leather for absolute durability, comfort and styleTang clasp with branding to provide a snug Fit in styleHoles to customize fitCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality
